name: ISmart HD PZ Camera With NDI AMC-NG320P

features.Key Features:: 20x optical zoom, up to 1080P60 resolution, support 59.94/29.97 frame rate; | Compact and compact appearance design with prominent Tally Lamp ; | Network protocols support SRT/ONVIF/RTMPS/VISCA OVER IP; | Support NDI HX3, WEB UI; | With HDMI, Network, 3G-SDI and USB3.0 video output interface, support POE; | Control Interface support RS-232 IN, RS-485/422; | Support large collaboration spaces such as classrooms, halls, live streaming | events, etc; | Compatible with mainstream video conference on the market; | Tally Lamp supported. | Sensor : 1/2.8" CMOS, 2.14 MP | Optical Zoom 20x | Lensa f=4.7~94.0mm; F1.6~3.5 | HFOV 59.5°~ 2.9° | Pan -170° ~ +170°; 0.1° ~ 120°/s | Tilt 30° ~ +90°; 0.1° ~ 90°/s | Preset Number 256 (Network) | Image Flip Support
features.Interface: HDMI : 1080P60 | Network : 1×10M/100M RJ45 (POE) | USB 3.0 Type-B, | 3G-SDI | Audio Input 1×LINE IN 3.5mm | Control Interface 1 × RS-232 IN, 1 × RS485/422
